case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE VS. TWANN RUCKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $782.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUCKER, TWANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-06-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF INDICATES THEY WISH TO DISMISS W/PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
